name: Just Eat Takeaway Food Delivery Platform API
what_it_does: Just Eat Takeaway (JET) food delivery platform API for restaurant operators and POS technology vendors to manage menus, receive orders, and operate delivery logistics through Just Eat's marketplace across the UK, Netherlands, Germany, Canada, Australia, and other markets — the world's largest food delivery company by order volume. Enables AI agents to manage restaurant menu for catalog item automation, handle order receipt for kitchen processing automation, access order status for delivery coordination automation, retrieve delivery tracking for courier dispatch automation, manage venue availability for open/closed status automation, handle pricing update for dynamic menu pricing automation, access performance analytics for restaurant reporting automation, retrieve promotional campaign for marketing automation, manage POS integration for unified order workflow automation, and integrate Just Eat with POS systems and restaurant management for end-to-end multi-market food delivery automation.
use_cases: Receiving and acknowledging Just Eat orders for restaurant POS integration and kitchen automation agents
Managing menu items and pricing across multiple restaurant locations for chain automation agents
Tracking order delivery status and courier location for customer communication automation agents
Accessing order history and revenue analytics for restaurant business reporting automation agents
not_for: Consumer ordering applications (Just Eat API is for restaurant operators and technology partners only)
Markets outside Just Eat's operating countries (JET has divested multiple markets including USA/Grubhub)
Non-restaurant food businesses (Just Eat is restaurant and meal delivery focused)
best_when: A restaurant operator or POS technology vendor in the UK, Netherlands, Germany, or other JET markets wanting AI agents to integrate with Just Eat's food delivery platform for automated order management and menu control.
avoid_when: TECHNOLOGY PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: Just Eat partner API requires Technology Partner Program approval; automated self-service API key assumption creates no access; automated must join Just Eat's TP program and receive API credentials. ORDER ACCEPTANCE SLA IS STRICT: Just Eat orders must be acknowledged within defined window or auto-cancel with financial penalty; automated slow order handling creates cancellation and partner rating impact. MARKET-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS: Just Eat/Takeaway.com operates under different brand URLs per market (just-eat.co.uk, thuisbezorgd.nl, lieferando.de); automated single endpoint creates wrong market routing; automated must use market-specific API endpoints. JUST EAT AND GRUBHUB SEPARATION: Just Eat Takeaway divested Grubhub (USA) in 2023; automated assumption of shared platform creates cross-market confusion; automated US integrations must use separate Grubhub platform.

auth.notes: Just Eat uses OAuth 2.0 for Technology Partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2000 (UK). AMS:TKWY (Euronext). Products: Food delivery, Scoober delivery service, Click & Collect, corporate food ordering. SDKs: None public. Operates in UK, NL, DE, CA, AU, IE, BE, FR, DK, NO, NZ, and others. 100M+ orders/year. Technology Partner Program for POS/tech vendors. Divested Grubhub (US) in 2023. Competes with Deliveroo and Uber Eats in Europe.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for Technology Partners; production requires JET partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 15-30% per order depending on market and tier; tech partner program pricing separate
pricing.notes: Amsterdam NL. Euronext listed. Commission per order per market. TP program required for API.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order webhooks near real-time; menu APIs throttled per restaurant

known_agent_gotchas: TECHNOLOGY PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: Just Eat API access requires TP program membership; automated developer key self-signup creates no credentials; automated must complete Just Eat Technology Partner application and agreement before API access

ORDER RESPONSE WINDOW IS STRICT: Just Eat orders require acknowledgment within response SLA (typically 90 seconds); automated late response creates auto-cancellation with financial penalty; automated must maintain real-time webhook consumer

MARKET-SPECIFIC BRAND AND ENDPOINTS: Just Eat/Takeaway operates as just-eat.co.uk (UK), thuisbezorgd.nl (NL), lieferando.de (DE), etc.; automated single endpoint creates wrong market API calls; automated must configure market-specific endpoint per deployment

GRUBHUB IS SEPARATE PLATFORM: Just Eat Takeaway sold Grubhub (USA) in 2023; automated JET-covers-USA assumption creates missing US market coverage; automated North America integration requires separate Grubhub platform integration

MENU UPDATE HAS PROPAGATION DELAY: Just Eat menu changes propagate with delay across caching layers; automated immediate consumer-visible change after API update creates stale menu state during propagation window; automated should track pending update status
agent_readiness.security_notes: Food delivery marketplace. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. EU/NL. Customer order and delivery data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Food delivery. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. EU/NL. Customer order and delivery data.
